title: spermacoce neoterminalis
intro: Spermacoce neoterminalis, also known as 'Buttonbush', is a shrub species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce neoterminalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
